title: Cover-up to shield political figures: Madras HC flags delay, selective probe in Senthil Balaji transformer tender case
description: The Madras High Court on Tuesday raised suspicions of a cover-up in the handling of corruption complaints lodged against former Tamil Nadu minister V Senthil Balaji in relation to the transformer tender case [Arapor Iyakkam v. Director]A Division Bench led by Chief Justice SA Dharmadhikari and Arul Murugan held that delay in acting on complaints and the decision to proceed only against a single official raised serious concerns about the fairness of the investigation process.CJ SA Dharmadhikari a
